items.text: Un tavolo per due, per favore
Mi porti a questo indirizzo, per favore

meaning.en: Take me to this address, please
How much is it to the centre?
Which platform does it leave from?
Does it stop at San Marco?
The next one is at ten
You need to get off at the next stop
Do you have a bigger size?

items.text: Mi dà lo scontrino, per favore?

meaning.en: Can I have the receipt, please?
How do I get to the Colosseum?
Can you show me on the map?
Is there a pharmacy near here?
A room under the name Rossi

items.text: Qual è la password del Wi-Fi?
La chiave della camera, per favore
La colazione è dalle sette alle dieci

meaning.en: Breakfast is from seven to ten

items.text: È la mia prima volta qui
Ho solo un bagaglio a mano
Qual è il motivo del viaggio?

meaning.en: What's the purpose of your trip?
Do you have something for a cold?

items.text: Prenda questo due volte al giorno

meaning.en: The password is on the table
Good evening, do you have a reservation?

nodes.speaker: user
nodes.text: No, un tavolo per due, per favore

meaning.en: No, a table for two, please

options.text: No, un tavolo per due, per favore

meaning.en: No, a table for two, please

cultureTips.en: Coffee at the bar counter costs less than at a table.
cultureTips.he: קפה בעמידה בבר זול יותר מקפה בישיבה ליד שולחן.

cultureTips.en: The "coperto" is a small fixed cover charge for table service — it is normal.
cultureTips.he: ה"קופרטו" הוא דמי שירות קבועים וקטנים על ישיבה — זה נורמלי.

nodes.speaker: user
nodes.text: Mi porti a questo indirizzo, per favore

meaning.en: Take me to this address, please

options.text: Mi porti a questo indirizzo, per favore

meaning.en: Take me to this address, please

cultureTips.en: Always validate your ticket in the yellow machine before boarding.
cultureTips.he: תמיד תקפו את הכרטיס במכונה הצהובה לפני העלייה.

meaning.en: Good morning, can I help you?

cultureTips.en: Keep the receipt until you leave the shop.
cultureTips.he: שמרו את הקבלה עד היציאה מהחנות.

meaning.en: Excuse me, where is the station?
Excuse me, where is the station?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Vada sempre dritto, poi giri a destra.

meaning.en: Good evening, how can I help you?

nodes.speaker: user
nodes.text: Ho una prenotazione a nome Rossi

meaning.en: I have a reservation under the name Rossi

options.text: Ho una prenotazione a nome Rossi

meaning.en: I have a reservation under the name Rossi

cultureTips.en: A simple "Buongiorno" when entering a shop is warmly appreciated.
cultureTips.he: "Buongiorno" פשוט בכניסה לחנות מתקבל בחום רב.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Passaporto e carta d'imbarco, per favore.

meaning.en: Here they are. I'm here on holiday
Here they are. I'm here on holiday
Stay calm, I'm coming right away.

cultureTips.en: The single emergency number in Italy and across Europe is 112.
cultureTips.he: מספר החירום האחיד באיטליה ובכל אירופה הוא 112.

meaning.en: Good morning, how can I help?

nodes.speaker: user
nodes.text: Ho mal di testa. Avete qualcosa?

meaning.en: I have a headache. Do you have something?

options.text: Ho mal di testa. Avete qualcosa?

meaning.en: I have a headache. Do you have something?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Certo. Prenda questo due volte al giorno.

meaning.en: Of course. Take this twice a day.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Nessun problema, questo non lo è.

cultureTips.en: Pharmacies (green cross) give advice for minor ailments — no doctor needed.
cultureTips.he: בבתי מרקחת (צלב ירוק) מקבלים ייעוץ לבעיות קלות — בלי רופא.

meaning.en: Excuse me, is there Wi-Fi here?
Excuse me, is there Wi-Fi here?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Sì, la password è sul tavolo.

meaning.en: Yes, the password is on the table.
Thanks. What time do you close?
Thanks. What time do you close?
